# claude-frog


> The org-wide base is imported above (Claude Code). It reaches Codex globally via
> `~/.codex/AGENTS.md`; this repo's Codex context is the generated `AGENTS.md`. After
> editing this file, regenerate it: `~/dev/platform/machine/codex/gen-agents-md.sh --repo .`

A pixel **Clyde-Frog terminal mascot** that dances while Claude Code is thinking and quietly
warns when you're burning too much context — plus an honest context/token gauge. Single
stdlib file, pane-only. Project repo in `forgewurks-labs`.
